bubble.fresh: What would you like to note?

bigFive.label: Big Five
bigFive.cta: Light a star with Big Five

attachment.label: Attachment
attachment.cta: Light a star with the relationship check

esm.label: Today's check-in
esm.cta: Light a star with a quick check-in

values.label: Values
values.cta: Light a star with the values audit

home.text: You're back. Right now you're shining as seven stars.

ops.text: Here's today's routine. Let's keep the rhythm going.
ops.tip: Check off one. Momentum does the rest.

account.text: This is your space. Everything about you lives here.
account.tip: Profile, settings, and your data are one tap away.

capture.text: Don't let that thought slip away.
capture.tip: One line is enough. I'll sort it.

chat.text: Ask anything. I'll answer from your records.
chat.tip: You can ask things like "How am I lately?"

lens.text: Your extraversion star brightened a step this week.
lens.tip: Tap a changed axis to see the evidence.

iden.text: I packed you into one file. Take it anywhere.
iden.tip: You can mask sensitive items before exporting.

wiki.text: Your knowledge, linked like a constellation.
wiki.tip: Tap a node to wander between your notes.

home.hint: Tap the seven stars to open your seven life areas

bubble.intro: Hi, I'm SecondB. Tap my head and I'll help.

career.line: What have you built and gathered?

finance.line: What does money say about me?

relation.line: How am I with the people close to me?

growth.line: Which period shaped who I am now?

health.line: How are my condition and rhythm these days?

museum.line: Walk the path AI has taken, and learn how SecondB understands you.

capture.title: Capture
capture.subtitle: Capture it in a format and SecondB weaves it into the right star.

what.label: What
what.hint: Jot the heart of the thought or moment

capture.linkHint: Paste a link and SecondB pulls the title and summary.
capture.banner: The moment you save it, SecondB sorts it into the right star and tags.
capture.saveError: Could not save. Try again in a moment.

chat.user: I've been so worn out lately. Why is that?
chat.ai: Over the last two weeks your records are all work, no rest. Your extraversion star dimmed below its usual, too.

lens.emptyBody: Finish the trait check once and your Trait State star lights up.
lens.errorBody: Please try again in a moment.
lens.insight: Extraversion rose 6 points this week. You met more people.
lens.headline: Verify · Big Five
lens.subtitle: Hidden grain (layer B) · a proposal triangulated from your domain behavior

attachment.headline: Attachment style
attachment.subtitle: Hidden grain (layer B) · your relationship domain seen through the ECR scale
attachment.insight: You reach out first to those close to you, but keep some distance when you're busy. 12 relationship-star records back this read.
attachment.emptyBody: Finish the attachment check once and your Relational Self star lights up.
attachment.errorBody: Please try again in a moment.

iden.northStar: "Understand myself deeply, live more like myself."
iden.emptyBody: Finish one tool and your IDEN starts to take shape.

recall.title: Recall
recall.eyebrow: Which era made the person I am now
recall.hint: Tap a period to start a drill-down question
recall.footer: Repeated questions raise the coherence of your recall.
recall.emptyBody: Recall your past eras one by one, and which years shaped you gathers here.

seen.title: Seen self
seen.eyebrow: How close is the me others see to the me I see
seen.conclusion: Others see you as a more lively person. You may be more extraverted than you think.
seen.obsTitleGap: The me I see, the me they see
seen.obsNote: Not what others actually think; the traits from your own Big Five that read most from outside.
seen.combinedNote: A combined picture from {{count}} people; no single answer is identifiable.
seen.emptyTitleNoPeers: No peer responses to compare yet
seen.emptyBodyFinishBigFive: Finish your own Big Five check and you'll see the me you see beside the me they see.
seen.emptyBodySendSurvey: Send a short survey to someone close, and you'll see the me you see beside the me others see.

rhythm.title: Rhythm
rhythm.caption: Most yourself: Saturday morning. You feel best when absorbed in making something.
rhythm.emptyBody: Log your mood for a few days, and when you feel most yourself shows up as a rhythm here.

possible.title: Future self
possible.eyebrow: Where I'm heading - the me that isn't data yet
possible.a1Body: Making moving thoughts into form my work
possible.a2Body: Becoming someone who keeps ties long over wide
possible.a3Body: Someone who keeps the standard inside
possible.footer: Dashed = the me before the data fills in
possible.emptyBody: Talk with SecondB in divergent mode, and the you before the data fills in lands here.

relational.title: Relations
relational.conclusion: Depth stands out more than breadth in your relationships. A few, often, for a long time.
relational.emptyTitle: No people or knowledge linked yet
relational.emptyBody: As people and interests build up in your records, the you inside relationships and knowledge shows here.

values.title: Work·growth
values.eyebrow: What have I built up in this area
values.conclusion: You've built the most in Career. Finance is still empty - shall we put more in?
values.emptyBody: Add records and you'll see which areas you've grown the most.

imagine.title: Imagine
imagine.introBody: Throw far, no right answers. Pick a branch you like and we'll narrow it into a next step.

audit.title: Past me
audit.subtitle: Pick a period and bring that version of you back to mind.

me.title: North Star
me.headline: Understand myself deeply, live more like myself.
me.hiddenBody: Your domain data triangulates frameworks like Big Five and attachment. Starlight is how much you put in, confidence is how validated it is. They are different.

axisCheck.emptyText: Finish the interview and this fills in from your own records.

values.headline: Values
values.subtitle: Hidden grain (layer B) · what you hold most important
values.insight: Self-direction ranks highest. A run of records where you chose to 'decide for yourself' in work and relationships backs this read.

selfDirection.name: Self-direction
selfDirection.note: You feel most yourself when you decide and move on your own

stimulation.name: Growth
stimulation.note: Novelty and learning pull you forward

authenticity.name: Authenticity
authenticity.note: You want your inside and outside to match

benevolence.name: Care
benevolence.note: A heart for looking after those close to you

achievement.name: Achievement
achievement.note: You like the feeling of having pulled it off

security.name: Stability
security.note: Predictability is a lower priority for you

motivation.headline: Motivation
motivation.subtitle: Hidden grain (layer B) · what moves you
motivation.balanceNote: You mostly move because you want to. Meaning and curiosity fuel you more than reward.
motivation.insight: Autonomy is the core of your motivation. You go furthest when work is done 'your way', not 'because you were told'.

autonomy.name: Autonomy
autonomy.note: Motivation rises when you decide for yourself

competence.name: Competence
competence.note: A sense that you can do it holds you up

relatedness.name: Relatedness
relatedness.note: You move a little more when you're with others

strengths.headline: Strengths
strengths.subtitle: Hidden grain (layer B) · what makes you you
strengths.insight: Your curiosity for the unfamiliar looks like the strength that carries you furthest.

curiosity.name: Curiosity
curiosity.note: The drive to dig into new things

grit.name: Grit
grit.note: Once you grab hold, you hold on

honesty.name: Honesty
honesty.note: You try to keep your inside and outside aligned

empathy.name: Empathy
empathy.note: You read the grain of others well
